diagrams.title: Capacity Planning Strategies Comparison
diagrams.description: Shows three strategies on timeline: Lead (adds early), Match (adds gradually), Lag (adds after need)
diagrams.purpose: Understand when to add capacity relative to demand

diagrams.title: System Performance vs Utilization
diagrams.description: Graph showing performance metrics change as utilization increases
diagrams.purpose: Visualize optimal utilization range and degradation effects

diagrams.title: Bottleneck Concept
diagrams.description: Water pipe analogy showing system bottleneck
diagrams.purpose: Understand how single component limits overall throughput

diagrams.title: Capacity Planning Lifecycle
diagrams.purpose: Remember the iterative nature of capacity planning
